notes: Refers to a monetary fine imposed for minor offences, e.g. traffic violations. Not to be confused with 'Strafe' (general punishment) or 'Geldstrafe' (criminal fine).

sentences.german: Er musste ein Bußgeld von 50 Euro zahlen, weil er zu schnell gefahren war.
sentences.english: He had to pay a fine of 50 euros because he had been driving too fast.

sentences.german: Die Bußgelder für Falschparken sind in dieser Stadt sehr hoch.
sentences.english: The fines for illegal parking are very high in this city.
